name: dog-collar-leash-set
displayName: Animoxkart Basics Dog Collar and Leash Set
description: Elevate your pet's everyday walks with the Animoxkart Basics Collar and Leash Set. Crafted for simplicity and functionality, this set includes a sturdy dog collar and a matching dog leash, providing a reliable and stylish solution for your canine companion. The Basics Collar features an adjustable strap for a secure and comfortable fit, while the leash boasts durability and a comfortable grip. Together, they create a harmonious ensemble for your dog's outdoor adventures. Choose the Animoxkart Basics Collar and Leash Set for a dependable and straightforward solution that enhances the joy of every walk.
shortDetails: Upgrade your dog's essentials with the Animoxkart Basics Collar and Leash Set. This thoughtfully designed dog collar and leash set combines simplicity and functionality, featuring a sturdy collar and matching leash for a reliable and stylish walking experience.
